com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3

Interface UART3Port

  • Deprecated. 
    This module can be only supported on the following devices.
    • CPOS X5 A7/A10
    • N910 A7
    • N700 A7
    • N850 A7
    • U2000
    The other devices please refer to SerialPort, which created by SerialPortManager.createInstance(com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.serialportmanager.SerialPortType, SerialPortSettings).

    public interface UART3Port
    Provides the ability to communicate with devices on UART3.

    How to create a UART3Port instance:

         // Type is required to create a UART3Port.
     UART3Port uart3Port = new UART3PortImpl(UART3Type.RS232_OTHER);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void close()
      Deprecated. 
      Closes this UART3 port.
      void flush()
      Deprecated. 
      Clears receiving buffer of port.
      void open()
      Deprecated. 
      Opens UART3 port.
      byte[] read(int maxLen, int timeout)
      Deprecated. 
      Reads data after the port is opened.
      void setConfig(UART3Config config)
      Deprecated. 
      Sets configuration of this UART3 port before it is opened.
      void write(byte[] data, int maxLen, int timeout)
      Deprecated. 
      Writes data after the port is opened.

    • Method Detail

      • open

        void open()
   throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Opens UART3 port.

        Note: If config has not been set before, default config will be applied.

        • Default data bits: DataBits.DATA_BIT_8
        • Default parity bit: ParityBit.NO_CHECK
        • Default stop bits: StopBits.STOP_BIT_ONE
        • Default baud rate: BaudRate.BPS115200
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setConfig

        void setConfig(UART3Config config)
        Deprecated. 
        Sets configuration of this UART3 port before it is opened.
        Parameters:
        config - [Optional] Configuration of this UART3 port.See UART3Config.
          If it is null, default values will be applied.
        • Default data bits: DataBits.DATA_BIT_8
        • Default parity bit: ParityBit.NO_CHECK
        • Default stop bits: StopBits.STOP_BIT_ONE
        • Default baud rate: BaudRate.BPS115200
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • read

        byte[] read(int maxLen,
            int timeout)
     throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Reads data after the port is opened.
        Parameters:
        maxLen - [Required] Max length to read.
        timeout - [Required] Timeout to read. Unit: ms, not to wait when it is <=0.
        Returns:
        Data.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • write

        void write(byte[] data,
           int maxLen,
           int timeout)
    throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Writes data after the port is opened.
        Parameters:
        data - [Required] Data to write.
        maxLen - [Required] Max length to write.
        timeout - [Required] Timeout to write. Unit: ms, not to wait when it is <=0.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • close

        void close()
    throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Closes this UART3 port.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • flush

        void flush()
    throws NSDKException
        Deprecated. 
        Clears receiving buffer of port.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
